content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:5 but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI or accessory features anywhere in the described view.
Pierre: Apple requires HomeKit usage to be tied to genuine home-automation functionality; an unused `HMHomeManager` instance in an unrelated wallpaper app looks like framework misuse or leftover template code, and may also trigger a HomeKit usage-description prompt with no matching UI, raising review questions. Please remove the HomeKit import/manager if it's unused, or add real home-management features if HomeKit access is actually needed.
